title: ProjectRepos
description: Array of detected projects emitted by `gitmap <type>-repos --json` (go-repos, node-repos, react-repos, cpp-repos, csharp-repos).

id.description: SQLite row ID for the DetectedProject record

projectType.description: Short type key (go, node, react, cpp, csharp)

projectName.description: Display name of the project (folder or manifest-derived)

absolutePath.description: Absolute filesystem path to the project root

repoPath.description: Absolute filesystem path to the owning repository root

relativePath.description: Path of the project relative to its repo root

primaryIndicator.description: File or marker that triggered detection (e.g. go.mod, package.json)

detectedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the row was written
